via the Health Plan Management System (HPMS). This includes information on which drugs are subject 
to quantity limits, which restrict the amount that a beneficiary may receive within a certain time 
period. The value of this field may not exactly represent the beneficiary experience at the time of the 
prescription fill (e.g., no data are collected at the time of the transaction to indicate the actual 
beneficiary experience).
